title: Bare Bones More Armor Trims
description: Adds Bare Bones support for the More Armor Trims mod.
body:
# Bare Bones More Armor Trims
This resource pack is for those who want to use Bare Bones and the More Armor Trims mod.

Adds textures for the following:
- Storm Armor Trim
- Ram Armor Trim
- Myth Armor Trim
- Greed Armor Trim
- Beast Armor Trim
- Fever Armor Trim
- Wraith Armor Trim
- Nihility Armor Trim
- Horizon Armor Trim
- Origin Armor Trim

# All credits go to:
## More Armor Trims
[![More Armor Trims](https://imgur.com/uG4WJHv.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-armor-trims)
## Bare Bones
[![Bare Bones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rox3U8B6/images/58c3aa9aa281f4378bda0f177df0d029fa501cc2.jpeg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones)
